SHIFT4 PAYMENTS, INC., ANTICIPATED ANNUAL AWARD OF VESTED RESTRICTED STOCK UNITS

Subsequent to the submission of this report on January 24, 2025, the filer received his 2024 annual RSU award on February 20, 2025. These shares vested immediately upon grant and have been converted to Class A common stock.
26 North Aviation, Inc. (manages corporate jets and provides charter aircraft services)
Space Flight Services & Strategic Agreements with Space Exploration Technologies Corp., contract for space flight services in Polaris Program
Trademarks on "Polaris Dawn," "Polaris Program" and "Polaris Jet Team" (value not readily ascertainable)

Tax Receivable Agreement (TRA) with Shift4 Payments, Inc. – under the TRA, the Corporation agrees to make payments to the historic equity owners in an amount equal to a percentage of the benefit the corporation derives from certain specific tax attributes, if, as, and when realized. (2020-06-01)

Pursuant to my employment agreement, for 36 months after resignation, I will be eligible for health insurance benefits and other reimbursed expenses for fees in connection with former employment/ownership. (2020-06-01)

If confirmed, I will resign my positions as CEO, Director, and Chairman with Shift4 and its subsidiaries, and surrender my majority voting control of the company.  In order to do so, I will take steps to convert my Class B shares, Class C shares, and LLC Units into Class A shares (normal shares), which would reduce my current 75% voting interest to a voting interest approximately 25%. (2025-03-01)
